REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WIGGINS, WILLIAM WASHINGTON, BERT KING, DAN A WALTON, ROSE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIGGINS, WILLIAM WASHINGTON, BERT KING, DAN A WESLEY, LYDIA P. WALTON, ROSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 ELLIS STREET, APT. 8H, S.F. $2,448.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,448.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-27-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT PORTION ONLY AGAINST DEFT WESLEY P. LYDIA, WHO AGREED THAT DEFT ROSE WALTON WILL MOVE OUT OF THE UNIT COMPLETELY BY 12:OO NOON AUG 2, 1993. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DECLARATION IN LIU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FIRST AMENDED BY CAREY JACKO, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ALLYCE KIMERLING AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 350 ELLIS, #8-H. FOFEITURE OF LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT. $2,448 RENT & DAMAGES THROUGH 7-31-93. WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO NOON 9-27-93 UPON THE CONDITION DEF. NOT HAVE ANY PERSONS STAY OVERNIGHT IN HIS UNIT. DEF. TO HAVE NO CONTACT WITHIN THE BLDG. WITH ROSE WALTON, WILLIAM WIGGINS, BURT WASHINGTON & DAN A. KING. DEF. GUARANTTEES ROSE WALTON WILL VACATE BY 8-2-93, NOON & DEF. WARRANTS HE WILL BE THE SOLE OCCUPANT AS OF 8-2-93. IF DEF. FAILS TO MEET THE STIPULATIONS IN REGARD TO THE STAY, PL. MAY BY EXPARTE APPLICATION W/24HRS NOTICE TO DEF. LIFT THE 9-27-93 STAY. NO FURTHER STAYS. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
